series_metadata.series_description: All USDA Child Nutrition Program sponsors must complete a sponsor application with supporting documents. Supporting documents include but are not limited to: sponsor access form, demonstrations of financial viability, budgets, vending agreements, menus and menu certification, inspections and operating licenses, enrollment data, training documentation, and federal taxation documentation.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: sponsor applications three years current year. If an agency is terminated cause, removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or any outstanding debt is paid USDA; if an appeal is filed ; Electronic: sponsor applications three years current year. If an agency is terminated cause, removed from National Disqualified List or State Disqualified List (a minimum of seven years) and/or any outstanding debt is paid USDA; if an appeal is filed
